description: You are an AV technician setting up VLC Media Player for a live theater production. Configure VLC's global preferences to always open videos in fullscreen, disable the media title display at start, disable the On-Screen Display (OSD), and enable 'play and stop' behavior. Create an XSPF playlist at /home/ga/Documents/show_cues.xspf containing the following files from /home/ga/Videos/theater_assets/ in order: cue_01_storm_projection.mp4, cue_02_thunder_clap.flac, cue_03_ariel_song.mp3, and cue_04_island_ambient.mp4. For cue_03_ariel_song.mp3, configure the playlist to start playback at 15 seconds.
